modeling_assumptions: min-max normalization across records for scope_weight and last_used_hours
observed_risk is equal-weight average of scope_norm, last_used_norm, rotation_risk
age_days is recorded but not used in risk formula due missing normalization rule
notes.sensitivity_policy: 5% perturbation on observed_risk (+/-0.05) per record; expert-review required only if class_code changes

output_summary: Normalized actual outputs from artifact files.
artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
